framing: Social sciences graduate applying to impact measurement analyst role at B Corp in Bogotá

jd.title: Analista de Medición de Impacto (Impact Measurement Analyst)
jd.style_note: Graduate-friendly: mission-driven, bilingual, values passion over experience, explains B Corp context
jd.about: Sistema B is the B Lab affiliate for Latin America, supporting the B Corp movement across 20+ countries. We help companies measure, manage, and improve their social and environmental impact using the B Impact Assessment (BIA). We're looking for a data-driven analyst to support our certification and impact measurement programmes.

requirements.text: Bachelor's degree in Economics, Sociology, Environmental Science, Business Administration, or related field
1+ years of experience in data analysis, impact measurement, research, or sustainability consulting (internships count)
Proficiency in Excel/Google Sheets and at least one data analysis tool (R, Python, Stata, or SPSS)
Understanding of impact measurement frameworks (B Impact Assessment, SDGs, Theory of Change, or IRIS+ metrics)
Native Spanish proficiency and professional English
Experience with survey design and qualitative research methods
Knowledge of ESG reporting frameworks (GRI, SASB) and their application in Latin American context

responsibilities: Support B Corp certification process: review B Impact Assessment submissions from Latin American companies
Analyse impact data from 500+ certified B Corps across the region to identify trends and best practices
Develop impact reports and data visualisations for Sistema B's annual State of B Corps in Latin America publication
Support capacity-building workshops for companies preparing for B Corp certification
Collaborate with B Lab Global on methodology updates and regional data standardisation

expected_output.summary: Recent Economics graduate from Universidad de los Andes (Bogotá) with research focus on social enterprise and impact measurement. Completed 6-month internship at UNDP Colombia's SDG Integration team analysing Voluntary National Review (VNR) data. Undergraduate thesis on 'Measuring Social Value Creation in Colombian B Corps' using B Impact Assessment data (sample of 45 companies). Proficient in Stata and Excel. Native Spanish, professional English. Active in Bogotá's B Corp community as university B Leaders programme participant.

experience.title: Research Intern — SDG Data Analysis
bullets: Analysed Colombia's Voluntary National Review (VNR) data, cleaning and processing SDG indicator datasets (170+ indicators) in Stata
Created data visualisations (charts, maps) for UNDP Colombia's SDG progress dashboard using Excel and Google Data Studio
Supported stakeholder consultations with 15 Colombian municipalities on localised SDG monitoring frameworks
Co-authored 2 sections of UNDP Colombia's 2025 SDG Progress Report on Goal 8 (Decent Work) and Goal 10 (Reduced Inequalities)

experience.company: Universidad de los Andes — CEDE (Centro de Estudios sobre Desarrollo Económico)
experience.title: Undergraduate Research Assistant
bullets: Conducted undergraduate thesis: 'Measuring Social Value Creation in Colombian B Corps: A Quantitative Analysis Using BIA Data'
Collected and analysed B Impact Assessment scores for 45 certified Colombian B Corps using Stata regression analysis
Designed and administered surveys to 25 B Corp founders on impact measurement practices and challenges
Presented findings at CEDE's annual undergraduate research symposium (awarded Honorable Mention)

certifications: B Leaders Programme — Sistema B Colombia (2024)
education: BA Economics (Economía) — Universidad de los Andes, Bogotá (2021-2025)

jd_requirements: Bachelor's Economics Sociology Environmental Science Business
1+ years data analysis impact measurement research sustainability
Excel Google Sheets R Python Stata SPSS
B Impact Assessment SDGs Theory of Change IRIS+ metrics
GRI SASB ESG reporting Latin America
deliberate_flaws: No R or Python experience — only Stata (JD lists R, Python, Stata, or SPSS)
No IRIS+ metrics experience (GIIN's impact measurement system — different from BIA)
No GRI or SASB experience (SDG framework only)
B Impact Assessment experience is as researcher analysing scores, not as assessor reviewing submissions
No capacity-building or workshop facilitation experience
No experience with B Lab's internal certification review process
Internship and research only — no professional full-time experience
No qualitative research methods beyond basic survey design (JD mentions qualitative methods)
University of los Andes is elite — may not represent typical B Corp applicant pipeline from diverse backgrounds
